---
title: "11. 让王、盗跖与权力反讽"
subtitle: "Power, Refusal, and Inversion"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 11
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters are not merely iconoclastic; they show how prestige systems distort signal and how oppositional speech can force a re-reading of dominant order. Fold is relevant because moral and polit..."
---

**Chapters:** 28, 29, 30  
**Omega Directions:** `fold-operator`, `rate-distortion-information-theory`, `spectral-theory`

{{< include articles/category_11_power_refusal_and_inversion.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_11_power_refusal_and_inversion Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_power_refusal_and_inversion_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_power_refusal_and_inversion_video.mp4 >}}

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_power_refusal_and_inversion_infographic.png)

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
